metadata.source_table: Table 1, Dimensions of Welded and Seamless Stainless Steel Pipe and Nominal Weights of Steel Pipe, Plain End
metadata.web_app_note: Use this library for stainless steel pipe S-schedules. B36.19M schedule names use S suffix such as 5S, 10S, 40S, and 80S.
metadata.selection_note: For pressure design, calculate required thickness as per governing code such as ASME B31.3, then select the next suitable tabulated wall thickness from this library.
